title: glandularia dusenii
intro: Glandularia dusenii, also known as Rock Pink or Pink Verbena, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Glandularia dusenii include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Glandularia dusenii include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a carrier oil.
